subject: [COMMON][ETCD] Update chart with service account
commit_message:
[COMMON][ETCD] Update chart with service account

Add service account to chart, values and deployment/statefulset.

Issue-ID: OOM-2930
Signed-off-by: farida azmy <farida.azmy.ext@orange.com>
Change-Id: I8109b4f6a5744a1e4b9a96de211203c374881fbf
